requirement_topic.en: DGSM Standards Route for BESS Imports

summary.en: Oman market access for BESS should be checked against the Directorate General for Standards and Metrology standards route, including whether IEC-based battery, electrical safety, EMC, labelling, or conformity documents are requested by customs, the importer, the project owner, or the utility. Oman Ministerial Decree 190/2021 issued the Technical Regulation for the Conformity System under MoCIIP; whether that route captures a specific BESS scope should be confirmed. In practice, DGSM or project specifications may reference IEC standards rather than a BESS-only national product certificate.
summary.zh: BESS进入阿曼市场时，应核查标准计量总局（DGSM）的标准路径，包括海关、进口商、项目业主或电力公司是否要求IEC体系的电池、电气安全、EMC、标签或符合性文件。阿曼部长令190/2021发布了商业、工业和投资促进部项下的《合格评定体系技术法规》；该路径是否覆盖具体BESS范围应另行确认。实践中，DGSM或项目技术规范可能引用IEC标准，而非单独的BESS国家产品证书。
summary.zht: BESS進入阿曼市場時，應核查標準計量總局（DGSM）的標準路徑，包括海關、進口商、項目業主或電力公司是否要求IEC體系的電池、電氣安全、EMC、標籤或符合性文件。阿曼部長令190/2021發布了商業、工業和投資促進部項下的《合格評定體系技術法規》；該路徑是否覆蓋具體BESS範圍應另行確認。實務中，DGSM或項目技術規範可能引用IEC標準，而非單獨的BESS國家產品證書。

standards_or_laws: Oman DGSM standards and conformity-assessment requirements
Oman Ministerial Decree 190/2021: Technical Regulation for the Conformity System (MoCIIP)
IEC 62619 for industrial lithium secondary cells and batteries
IEC 62933 series for electrical energy storage systems

summary.en: China exporters commonly provide GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, factory test reports, and Chinese-language manuals. These documents are useful evidence but should be cross-referenced to the IEC clauses and Oman project specifications requested by the importer or project owner.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常提供GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、工厂测试报告和中文说明书。这些文件可作为有用证据，但应与进口商或项目业主要求的IEC条款和阿曼项目技术规范逐项对应。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常提供GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、工廠測試報告和中文說明書。這些文件可作為有用證據，但應與進口商或項目業主要求的IEC條款和阿曼項目技術規範逐項對應。

gap.en: The common gap is assuming that a China GB report is automatically accepted as the Oman market-access file. Exporters should prepare an English compliance matrix mapping Chinese evidence to IEC 62619, IEC 62933, DGSM or project clauses, model identity, ratings, labels, manuals, and installation limits.
gap.zh: 常见差距是误以为中国GB报告可自动作为阿曼市场准入文件。出口商应准备英文合规矩阵，将中国证据映射至IEC 62619、IEC 62933、DGSM或项目条款、型号身份、额定值、标签、说明书和安装限制。
gap.zht: 常見差距是誤以為中國GB報告可自動作為阿曼市場准入文件。出口商應準備英文合規矩陣，將中國證據映射至IEC 62619、IEC 62933、DGSM或項目條款、型號身份、額定值、標籤、說明書和安裝限制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory or project-specific depending on DGSM, customs, importer, and project-owner requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic CN market under GB 44240-2024; GB/T 36276-2023 is recommended and commonly referenced

source.publisher: Oman Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Investment Promotion / DGSM

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Oman BESS market access, including any route under Ministerial Decree 190/2021, as a DGSM and project-specification mapping exercise. Chinese GB evidence should be translated into an IEC / Oman compliance file before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将阿曼BESS市场准入，包括部长令190/2021项下可能路径，视为DGSM和项目技术规范映射工作。出货前应将中国GB证据转换为IEC / 阿曼合规文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將阿曼BESS市場准入，包括部長令190/2021項下可能路徑，視為DGSM和項目技術規範映射工作。出貨前應將中國GB證據轉換為IEC / 阿曼合規文件。
